text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gee, I sure hope my poster is as flashy<n>as this one!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once I'm more grown-up and shine<n>super-duper
bright, will I get modeling<n>offers?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I better work hard to make sure<n>that
happens!
